problem: How to engineer materials that autonomously repair microcracks before failure?
hypothesis: How to engineer materials that autonomously repair microcracks before failure? remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Shape. Shape memory alloy phase transition directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: Prototype device testing with 5 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: Real knowledge is to know the extent of one's ignorance. — Confucius
